title: Image to SVG Logo Conversion
desc: I have a logo and I need a crisp, fully-scalable vector version for print and web use. The vector must faithfully match the original colours, shapes, and proportions so it can drop straight into my site without further tweaking. Please base your bid on the single task of tracing/re-drawing the artwork and delivering a clean, layered SVG file. If you have a quick, accurate workflow for raster-to-vector work—Illustrator, Inkscape, or similar—let me know; I value proven experience with this kind of precision work. Deliverable • One production-ready vector file that renders perfectly at any size and passes an eyes-on comparison with the source image.

title: Investment Pitch Deck
desc: We are seeking a highly talented presentation designer with exceptional visual communication skills to create a world-class investment pitch deck for a leading AI infrastructure and data center company. Responsibilities include: • Designing the overall look, feel, and structure of the presentation. • Converting written content into clear, concise, and visually engaging slides. • Creating professional charts, diagrams, infographics, timelines, and data visualizations. • Selecting and incorporating high-quality graphics, imagery, and iconography that enhance the narrative. • Developing a consistent visual identity throughout the deck. • Ensuring the presentation meets the standards expected by institutional investors and investment banks. • Providing both PowerPoint and PDF deliverables. The successful candidate will have: • Proven exp

title: Need graphic design help

Funding for this position is secured through November, and we are looking to build a relationship with a designer who can become a trusted creative partner for our organization. What We're Looking For: Strong graphic design portfolio Experience creating print and digital marketing materials Ability to work within established branding guidelines Excellent communication and responsiveness Ability to meet deadlines with minimal supervision Nonprofit, civic engagement, or public affairs experience is a plus Why Work With Us? Vote Houston is a small, collaborative organization with a streamlined approval process. You'll work directly with decision-makers, receive timely feedback, and have the

title: PVC Advertising Banner Design
desc: Design a PVC advertising banner for a small charity summer fair. The task involves applying brand colors and incorporating creative thinking to produce an engaging banner design. The ideal candidate should have experience in graphic design and banner creation, with a focus on delivering visually appealing and effective designs.

title: Photoshop Masking Expert Needed
desc: I need someone to mask sections in Photoshop. They need to understand what I am asking them to mask then execute it. Attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions accurately are crucial. The images are of a 3D rendering of the interior of a church. Steps: 1. receive instructions for area to select with a mask. 2. Mask area and give it a "hue/saturation" adjustment layer. (no editing necessary). 3. Check for errors. 4. Send for approval. This job may require more cash then $150 depending on new designs I seek. If you are quick and accurate it can lead to many more opportunities doing this same straight forward work. Thank you for reading! Best, William

title: Pitch Deck - Pre-Seed Funding
desc: I'm raising a pre-seed round for a tech startup and need a sharp, polished pitch deck redesign. The content and narrative are already done — I need a designer to make it investor-ready. What I need: Clean, modern visual design that feels premium and confident Limited copy — every slide should communicate with visuals, data, and hierarchy, not paragraphs Consistent design system: typography, color palette, iconography, spacing Slides that work both as a leave-behind PDF and a live presentation What this is NOT: Not a template drop-in. I need an original, considered design Not a content rewrite — the story is set, this is a design job Not a Canva project What I have: A working deck with full content and slide structure Brand direction / color preferences (open to designer input) Reference decks I like Ideal designer: Has done startup pitch decks before, ideally for VC or angel fundraising Can show me 2–3 relevant portfolio examples Comfortable working in PowerPoint, Keynote, or Google Slides (tell me your preference) Responsive and able to turn this around in [2-4 days] To apply, please answer: Share 2–3 pitch deck samples from your portfolio What tool do you prefer to work in? How many revision rounds do you include? What's your estimated turnaround?

Microsoft Word and Excel efficiency a must.

title: Professional Media Kit Design for Speaker, Podcast Host, Author & Founder of LivingYosh.com
desc: PROJECT TITLE Professional Media Kit Design for Speaker, Podcast Host, Author & Founder of LivingYosh.com PROJECT DESCRIPTION I am looking for an experienced graphic designer to create a premium, professional media kit that I can confidently send to podcast hosts, publishers, schools, synagogues, event organizers, journalists, and media outlets. The final product should feel modern, inspiring, trustworthy, and professionally branded. It should resemble a high-end speaker or author media kit rather than a basic brochure. ABOUT ME My name is Joshua Markell. I am the founder of LivingYosh.com, a platform focused on faith, growth, purpose, meaningful discussions, inspiring stories, Torah values, and kindness. I am also: • A podcast host and guest • A public speaker • An aspiring author currently developing a memoir • An advocate for personal growth, resilience, faith, and community My personal story includes overcoming significant adversity, rebuilding after major life challenges, and using those experiences to help others grow stronger. MEDIA KIT GOALS The media kit should position me as: • Founder of LivingYosh.com • Speaker • Podcast Host • Podcast Guest • Author / Memoir Project DESIGN STYLE • Clean and modern • Professional and premium • Israel-inspired blue and gold color palet

title: Quick Turnaround Invite
desc: I need a talented graphic designer to create a polished, professional invitation for a SEAL PAC fundraising event I am hosting in Mount Pleasant, South Carolina. This is a quick-turn project with a final product needed within 24 hours. I will provide the prior event invitation as a visual reference, but this needs to be updated for the new event details, sponsorship levels, venue, and RSVP/payment flow. The previous invite used a patriotic SEAL PAC theme, highlighted the host, event location, special guests, sponsorship levels, and RSVP instructions. The final design should feel patriotic, high-end, clean, and appropriate for a congressional/political fundraising event. It should be suitable for email, text message sharing, social media, and printing. Event Details: Event: SEAL PAC Fundraiser Host: Gavin McCulley Date: July 7, 2026 Time: 12:00 PM to 2:00 PM Location: Tavern & Table Shem Creek, Mount Pleasant, South Carolina Event Description: Join us for a private lunch in support of SEAL PAC, dedicated to electing conservative veterans to Congress. Guests will have the opportunity to meet and spend time with the Congressman, discuss the year ahead, and support SEAL PAC’s mission. Sponsorship Levels: $1,000 Minimum Sponsorship Includes: Lunch Photograph with the Congressman Oppor

title: Vector Tracing of Owl Logo
desc: I need a clean, manual vector tracing of my existing owl and compass logo to create a perfect SVG file. The task is urgent and requires a production-ready output. The ideal candidate should have experience in vector tracing and logo design, ensuring a high-quality, scalable result. Requirements: 100% faithful to the reference (owl shape, eyes, compass ring, needle/beak, cardinal points, colors) Clean vector paths with good node structure (no messy auto-trace artifacts) Fully editable / layered SVG (owl group + compass group separate if possible) Optimized for web + print (scalable, small file size) Transparent background Deliver: Master SVG file 4096x4096 PNG Monochrome versions (navy only + white only) Small icon versions (512px, 256px, 128px, 64px) Timeline: today (within the next 8 hours). $100 bonus 200 total - if delivered with high quality within the next 8 hours. Please reply with: Your experience with logo vectorization Estimated turnaround (confirm you can do it today) will share files then

title: Vector logo recreation
desc: I have an existing logo I need cleaned up and recreated as production-ready vector files for apparel printing (Printify) and general brand use. My current logo is attached. I don't want it redesigned — just faithfully recreated as clean vectors. Recreate faithfully — preserve exactly: The brushed open-ring (enso) above the wordmark — the ring must stay OPEN in the center, with its hand-drawn brush texture. Do not fill it into a solid circle. The wordmark "HUMAN FRĒQ" in all caps with wide letter-spacing, matching the original. The macron (the bar) over the E in FRĒQ — must be clearly visible and correct. I need TWO versions of the logo: Version A: ring + "HUMAN FRĒQ" only (no web address) Version B: ring + "HUMAN FRĒQ" with "humanfreq.com" added underneath the wordmark Deliverables (for BOTH versions): Vector files: AI, EPS, SVG, and PDF (true outlined vectors, transparent background) Three color versions of each: copper #C09030, cream #EDE5D4, and near-black #3A2C1C Also provide a simplified mark (ring + "FRĒQ" only) for small uses like tags and caps High-res transparent PNGs of every version, at least 4000px wide, 300 DPI Please confirm you can deliver all of this, and include your price, turnaround time, and number of revisions. Thank you!

title: Canva Social Media Design Work”
desc: I need an eye-catching Instagram post created directly in Canva. I prefer that you work inside Canva so I can easily tweak future versions myself. Deliverables • Editable Canva link with all fonts and assets properly organised • High-resolution JPG and PNG exports (1080×1350 px) ready for upload I’m happy to answer any sizing or brand guideline questions up front so the first draft is already close to final. If this turns out well, I have a steady stream of posts that need the same treatment.

title: Cardigan cards - additional cards to add to the site!
desc: hi! you previously worked on our website (https://cardigan.cards/) uploading card images and we have a few more for you to add! i'm including the original JD below (that came from Gaby and her upwork account) but i know you've already done several hours of work for us so hopefully you know what to do! let me know if you have any questions!!! We are a greeting card brand looking for a detail-oriented designer who is highly proficient in Adobe to help us move our existing card designs into mockup files we’ve purchased from Creative Market. This is a time-sensitive project and we need all files completed by Friday. Project Scope: - Our greeting cards are A2 size (4.25" x 5.5"). - All final card designs are already completed in Canva. - We will provide access to our organized Canva folder containing all designs. - We will also provide the mockup files purchased via Creative Market (PSD files). Your role will be to: - Export each finalized card design from Canva. - Place each design into the appropriate mockup file in Adobe - Ensure proper alignment, scaling, shadows, textures, and realism per the mockup setup. - Export final high-resolution mockup images. - Upload all completed mockups into a clearly organized Google Drive folder. title: Colorful Website Thumbnail Design [zanexatech.com] -- 4
desc: I’m refreshing the way my articles appear on the site and need a designer who can craft eye-catching thumbnails in a colorful, vibrant style. The core palette is fixed—bold reds paired with energetic yellows—so every graphic you create must lean on those two hues to keep the brand instantly recognizable. The thumbnails will accompany blog and feature articles, not videos or product pages, so typography hierarchy and clear headline space matter more than motion cues or pricing tags. Expect to work with supplied titles, a brief sentence of summary text, and an asset folder of photography or illustrations for each piece. Here’s what I need delivered: • A reusable thumbnail template (Photoshop or Figma preferred) built around red & yellow accents, sized for 1280 × 720 px. • Five initial thumbnails based on current live articles so I can gauge consistency across different topics. • Layered source files plus exported PNGs, optimized for web. I’ll review the first draft and send any notes within 24 hours; once approved, we can roll into future batches on a per-set basis. If you’ve got a portfolio that showcases bold color work and crisp, readable layouts, I’d love to see it.

title: Community Event Promotion Flyer Needed
desc: I'm looking for a creative designer to craft an engaging flyer to promote an upcoming party/social gathering. The flyer should be visually appealing, communicate the event details clearly, and entice the audience to participate. Ideal skills include graphic design, typography, and experience creating event-focused promotional materials. A quick turnaround is appreciated, as this project needs completion ASAP.

title: Company Brochure Design for Trade Show
desc: I need someone to assist with making company brochures to showcase the company's abilities for a trade show/expo coming up in mid-July. The ideal candidate should have experience in print design and graphic design, with a strong portfolio in brochure creation. The project requires a quick turnaround to meet the event deadline.

title: Conference Prospectus and Brochure Design
desc: We are seeking a skilled graphic designer to create a conference prospectus, brochure, and ad materials. The ideal candidate will have experience in print design and be proficient in Adobe Illustrator. The project involves designing visually appealing materials that effectively communicate our conference theme and details. Attention to detail and creativity are essential.

title: Convert 5 Images to Editable Vectors
desc: I have five highly detailed AI-generated images that my local printer says must be converted to Adobe Illustrator vectors so the colors can be tweaked without losing any of the intricate shading or line work. I personally need to be able to jump back in later and change both the background and the main subjects’ colors, so every layer or object has to remain fully editable. Here’s the scope: • Take the five supplied images and rebuild or trace them in Illustrator so they remain true to the original complexity. • Deliver each file as an .ai (layered, unlocked, colour-editable) and also export a matching print-ready PDF. If you like, you can include a clean PNG as a courtesy, but the AI/PDF is the priority. • Keep the artwork CMYK safe for printing. No embedded rasters that will blur when scaled. • Turnaround is strictly five hours from the moment I award; I’m on a tight schedule today. • My budget is locked at $15 per design ($75 total) and I’m unable to stretch it, so please accept the project only if that works for you. If you can meet those points and hit the five-hour window, I’ll be genuinely grateful and ready to start right away.

title: Corporate Back Cover Design
desc: I sponsored an event and need a professionally finished back cover for a conference program. The final artwork must be high-resolution (minimum 300 dpi) and laid out for print at 8 ¾ in × 11 ¼ in (2625 × 3375 px) with a ¼-inch bleed on all sides. The visual direction is firmly professional and corporate, so please build the composition around cool blues and balanced grays. I will supply the official logo and the approved copy; those two items should stand out clearly, with no graphics so the typography and brand mark remain the focal points. Deliverables • Print-ready PDF in CMYK, crop marks included • Layered source file (AI or PSD) so our in-house team can make future edits Once I hand over the assets, I’d appreciate a first proof within 24 hours so we can iterate quickly and send the book to press on schedule.

title: Creative Invitation Design for Arangetram and Grad Party
desc: I am seeking a talented designer to create a stunning one-page invitation for my daughter's Arangetram and graduation party. The design should capture the celebratory essence of these significant milestones and leave a lasting impression on the guests. It should be visually appealing with creative elements that reflect the cultural significance of the Arangetram while also highlighting the graduation theme. If you have experience in invitation design and a flair for creativity, I would love to see your portfolio and discuss this project further.

title: Desain Konten Media Sosial Kreatif
desc: Saya sedang mencari bantuan utama untuk membuat materi desain media sosial yang menarik—feed, story, hingga materi promosi singkat—dengan gaya konsisten, warna selaras brand, dan copy singkat yang efektif. Saya butuh: • 10–15 visual siap-unggah (format PSD/AI + PNG/JPEG) • Template editable agar mudah saya pakai ulang • Penyesuaian ukuran untuk Instagram & Facebook • 1x revisi mayor + 2x revisi minor Selain fokus di desain, saya juga terbuka jika Anda dapat sekaligus membantu proses purchasing yang menyertai project ini—mulai dari pengadaan barang, negosiasi harga, hingga manajemen pemasok untuk kebutuhan cetak atau merchandise pendukung. Sertakan portofolio desain media sosial terbaik Anda; bila memiliki pengalaman mengurus pengadaan atau negosiasi, tambahkan contoh kasus singkatnya. Saya menghargai komunikasi jelas, update progres teratur, dan komitmen tenggat waktu.

title: Desain Story Instagram Menarik -- 2
desc: Saya membutuhkan bantuan untuk membuat desain media sosial berupa Story untuk akun Instagram kami. Targetnya adalah visual yang rapi, selaras dengan identitas brand, dan cukup eye-catching agar penonton langsung terpikat dalam beberapa detik pertama. Ruang lingkup: • Satu template Story Instagram siap pakai (rasio 9:16, resolusi 1080×1920). • Warna, tipografi, dan ilustrasi menyesuaikan panduan brand yang akan saya kirim setelah proyek dimulai. • File akhir dalam format PNG siap unggah dan file terbuka (PSD atau AI) agar bisa kami edit di kemudian hari. Yang saya harapkan dari Anda: • Pengalaman mendesain konten Instagram, khususnya Story interaktif. • Kemampuan menjaga komposisi teks-gambar agar tetap terbaca di layar ponsel. • Komunikasi cepat untuk revisi ringan hingga hasil benar-benar sesuai brief. Jika Anda siap menghadirkan desain yang menarik, rapi, dan sesuai keinginan kami, kirimkan portofolio singkat berisi contoh Story Instagram terbaik Anda.

title: Design Brief: Conference Room City-Themed Signage
desc: We are rebranding our conference rooms and would like each room to be named after a city (we will tell you them) We are looking for a designer to create a signage system that feels professional, modern, and cohesive with our office environment. Objective Design a series of conference room signs/plaque concepts that: Clearly identify each room by city name Create a distinctive and memorable office experience Feel polished and premium Deliverables We would like mockups showing: Conference room plaque/sign mounted beside the door Multiple design concepts/styles Examples using several city names Visualizations of how the signs would look in a real office setting Recommendations for materials, finishes, and production methods Design Direction We're open to creative ideas, but interested in concepts such as: Option A: Modern Minimalist Large city name Clean typography Simple plaque (metal, acrylic, or wood) Elegant and timeless Option B: City-Inspired City name paired with a subtle skyline silhouette Coordinates of the city Small iconographic element unique to the city Option C: Travel / Destination Theme Inspired by airport signage, transit systems, or wayfinding Modern and sophisticated, not overly themed Materials & Finishes Open to recommendations, but interested in: Brushed metal

title: Elegant Facebook Carousel Ad Design
desc: I need a set of Facebook carousel images that feel classic and elegant while still stopping the scroll. The focus is on our current best-selling products, and every frame should quietly communicate the quality and craftsmanship that set us apart. The visuals should work as a cohesive story (1,080 × 1,080 px per card), using refined typography, balanced negative space, and a polished colour palette that matches our brand guidelines. Subtle overlays for headlines or taglines are welcome, but keep text minimal so the products remain the hero. Please deliver: • 5-6 fully-designed carousel cards • Editable source files (PSD or AI) with organised layers • Ready-to-upload JPEG/PNG exports optimised for Facebook’s recommended specs Show me a sample of similar elegant ad work in your portfolio, and let me know how quickly you can turn the first draft.

title: Event Flyer Design
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to create an eye-catching flyer for our upcoming event. The flyer should effectively communicate the event details and attract potential attendees. The ideal candidate will have experience in flyer design and a strong portfolio showcasing their work. Attention to detail and creativity are essential for this role.

title: Eye-Catching Social Post Graphics
desc: I need a set of fresh, visually engaging post graphics designed for my social-media channels. The goal is to stop users mid-scroll with layouts that feel on-brand, instantly communicate the message, and look great on both mobile and desktop feeds. Here is what I have in mind: • Format: square (1080×1080) and portrait (1080×1350) versions for each design, ready to upload to Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn. • Quantity: an initial batch of 5 posts so I can review style, followed by additional rounds once we lock in the look. • Deliverables: layered source files (PSD or AI) plus web-ready PNG/JPG exports. My brand palette and copy for each post will be provided; you help with creative layout, typography, iconography or simple illustrations as needed. Turnaround on the first draft should be quick, and I only release payment when the designs meet the agreed concept, clarity, and visual polish. If you’re confident in crafting standout social graphics and open to a collaborative, feedback-driven process, let’s get started.

title: Flyer Design (Upwork)
desc: Need the attached upscaled to be more professional. This is for an invite only exclusive senior executive event in NYC. C-suite and senior executive level company employees only. The flyer needs to reflect this level of professionalism and quality. Looking for the two attached designs to be polished up, along with two more designs of your choice. Please make the logos replaceable, not fixed, as the partners may change. provide an editable template (Canva, Word, Powerpoint, etc...) Can view our website here to see our corporate colors. www.digitalgarden.co.jp

desc: I need someone to create editable flyers using my brand colors for upcoming business events for women: BPE cashflow cruise, BPE CON, BPE at the KY Derby. The flyers should be visually appealing and effectively communicate the event details. The ideal candidate will have experience in print design and be able to deliver high-quality, editable files.

title: Graphic Design Aligned with Brand Standards
desc: I’m looking for a skilled designer who can create fresh visual assets while staying strictly inside my existing brand guidelines. You’ll receive the full style guide—logo lock-ups, colour palette, typography rules, imagery tone, even sample layouts—and every piece you produce must fit seamlessly within that framework. The exact formats are still flexible. I may need anything from eye-catching social posts and web banners to printable one-pagers or presentation slides, so versatility is important. What matters most is that each design feels cohesive with the rest of the brand and is delivered on time. Please share: • Examples where you worked under established brand rules • Your preferred tools (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign, Figma, etc.) • Typical turnaround for first drafts and revisions Final artwork should arrive as fully editable source files plus export-ready PNG, JPG or PDF, named and organised for easy hand-off. Let me know how you would tackle the first assignment and we can get started right away.

title: Graphic design - posters and social media
desc: Looking for help to design appealing vibrant posters and social media graphics advertising events and trainings, related to meditation teaching and also global justice. Want to avoid cliche imagery and ensure these are really appealing. Can provide clear brief/spec beforehand. Prefer to review portfolios before providing more details. Occasional ongoing work may follow. Please send samples.

title: Immediate - Graphic Designer Needed for Flyer Design
desc: We are seeking a talented graphic designer to create a visually appealing flyer for our upcoming event. The ideal candidate should have a strong portfolio showcasing previous flyer designs. Your creativity and attention to detail will be crucial in producing a flyer that effectively communicates our message while capturing the audience's attention. Please include examples of your work in your proposal.

title: Linked Banner created in Canva
desc: I need a skilled designer to craft a polished LinkedIn banner using Canva. Deliver a professional, on-brand banner optimized for LinkedIn dimensions, incorporating a clean layout, high-quality typography, cohesive color palette, and subtle visual elements that enhance personal or company branding. Provide editable Canva file and a high-resolution PNG export. Attention to alignment, legibility, and modern aesthetic required. T

title: Modern Social Media Graphics
desc: I need a cohesive set of branded visuals that feel fresh, uncluttered, and on-trend. All pieces should share a neutral, subdued colour palette with clean typography and plenty of negative space so they sit comfortably across my channels without overpowering the content. Deliverables • YouTube thumbnail – 1280 × 720 px, layered and editable (Canva link plus PNG) • Instagram post – 1080 × 1080 px, same design language, Canva link plus PNG • Web banner – 1920 × 480 px (or the closest standard you recommend), Canva link plus JPG/PNG • Logo – scalable vector (SVG or AI) + high-res PNG, designed to align with the above graphics I work mainly in Canva, so please supply each file as an editable Canva template along with the exported image formats noted. Consistent fonts, colour codes, and spacing across every asset are essential; no bright accents unless they remain within a muted, balanced range. First drafts within two days would be ideal; one reasonable revision pass is included before final sign-off. If anything here is unclear, let me know early so we can keep the workflow smooth.

title: Modern Store Graphics Package
desc: I’m refreshing my online shop and need a cohesive set of graphics that instantly tells shoppers they’re in a sleek, modern space. The scope is focused on three key areas: • Store Banner – a hero image that sets the tone the moment visitors land in the store, sized for desktop and mobile. • Product Detail Page (PDP) assets – template-ready image frames, iconography, and typography treatments that make features, specs, and calls-to-action pop without clutter. • Store Decoration – background elements, section dividers, and accent graphics that tie everything together and keep the look consistent across every page. Expect clean lines, bold but balanced color, and plenty of negative space—nothing fussy or ornamental. Source files (PSD or AI) plus optimized JPG/PNG exports for immediate upload are required. Deliver layered files, clearly labeled, so my team can tweak text or swap images later. When submitting, show a quick style preview or link to a similar modern-focused project you’ve done. Once we lock the direction, I’ll supply brand colors, product shots, and copy, and we can agree on milestones for banner first, then PDP, then decoration assets. Looking forward to seeing how you’ll turn a plain storefront into a polished, modern shopping experience.

title: Modern World Cup Pub Poster
desc: I'm looking for a modern-style poster for the World Cup that aligns with my pub's brand. The poster should prominently feature match dates and times. It's essential to use my pub's brand colors. Ideal Skills and Experience: - Graphic design expertise, especially in modern aesthetics - Experience creating event posters - Ability to incorporate brand colors seamlessly - Attention to detail for accurate match information Can provide brand logos and fonts for E&O pub cape charles, VA Want to display, “World Cup Match Headquarters” with time and dates of matches being played. Something that is roughly 36” x 24” in a poster Looking for a vintage British feel on this that matches our vibe

title: Monthly Event Poster Creation
desc: We are seeking assistance to create a poster for our events once a month. We are a not-for-profit organisation. Happy with Canva. We have a current colour scheme we use for branding. Does not need to be complicated.

title: Nightlife Event Flyer Design Refresh
desc: We are seeking a talented graphic designer to refresh our existing event flyers. The ideal candidate will have experience in creating eye-catching designs that effectively communicate our event details. You will be responsible for modernizing our current layouts, incorporating new branding elements, and ensuring that the flyers appeal to our target audience. If you have a strong portfolio showcasing your design skills in nightlife event flyers and a flair for creativity, we would love to see your work. Please submit your portfolio along with your proposal. ONLY DESIGNERS WITH EXPERIENCE IN NIGHTLIFE EVENT/PARTY FLYERS WILL BE CONSIDERED.

title: Playful Sign & Flyer Design
desc: I run a service-based company and I’m refreshing our visual presence, starting with a 3 m × 1.5 m sign that will sit front-and-center on our premises. The goal of this piece is simple: draw eyes to our brand name and logo in a way that feels playful, colourful, and unmistakably “us.” I’ll supply the existing logo files and any brand colours we already use; you bring the creativity to make them pop at this large format. Final art will need to be fully scalable (vector preferred) and ready for print at full size with bleed and safe zones in place. Beyond this flagship sign, I regularly need smaller signage variations, so I’m hoping to find someone who enjoys ongoing collaboration rather than a one-off drop-off. If we click, you’ll likely see a steady stream of similar projects. As a second, immediate deliverable, I need a single-page promotional flyer designed for a Mailchimp (“Mel chimp”) email blast. This should echo the look and feel of the new sign, fit standard A4/US-letter if printed, and export cleanly to both PDF and Mailchimp’s image requirements. Deliverables: • Print-ready 3 m × 1.5 m sign artwork (vector + hi-res PDF) • Coordinated one-page flyer for Mailchimp (editable source + PDF/JPG) If you have a knack for vibrant, fun visuals and can turn around polished, producti

title: Poster Design for Event
desc: We are seeking a skilled graphic designer to create a poster for our upcoming event. The poster should be visually appealing and effectively communicate the event details. The ideal candidate will have experience in print design and be proficient in Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator. The project is part-time and expected to be completed in less than a month.

title: Premium Conference Keynote Presentation Design
desc: I have a 46-slide keynote presentation that I will be delivering at Ea conference. IMPORTANT: Do NOT change slide order. Do NOT rewrite content. Do NOT remove content. Do NOT summarise content. Do NOT change the messaging. Focus purely on design, layout, readability, alignment, typography, spacing, image quality and visual consistency. Your objective is to transform the presentation from a workshop/training style deck into a premium conference keynote presentation. The final presentation should feel similar to: TED Talk Sequoia Capital Y Combinator First Round Capital Canva Global requirements: Standardise typography across all slides Montserrat ExtraBold for headings Montserrat Bold for subheadings Montserrat Medium for body text Consistent sizing hierarchy throughout Improve alignment Use a consistent grid system Align all text boxes Align all images Align all logos Ensure consistent margins throughout Improve spacing Increase whitespace where appropriate Improve spacing between headings and body content Improve spacing between bullets Improve spacing around images and diagrams Improve readability Increase font sizes where practical Improve line spacing Improve visual hierarchy Ensure tables and diagrams can be read from the back of a room Standardise colours Use a consistent p

title: Premium Event Rental Catalog Redesign & Modern Luxury Branding
desc: Hello, I am looking for a talented graphic designer to completely redesign and elevate my current product catalog for my event rental business. I already have an existing catalog that I can share as a reference/sample, along with high-quality product images for the new design. What I’m looking for: A modern, elegant, premium-looking catalog Clean and organized layout Visually attractive and luxury-oriented presentation Easy-to-update structure because I constantly add new furniture and event products to my inventory One very important thing for me is scalability. I would like the catalog to be designed in a way where adding new products in the future is simple — ideally just adding new pages while keeping the same design consistency and format. Please let me know: Your fixed price for the complete project Estimated delivery time Examples of similar catalogs or portfolio work you have done I’m looking for someone creative who can take this to the next level visually and help create a strong premium brand image for my business. Thank you!

title: Print-Ready Banner Design
desc: We need a single print-ready 94x36 double-sided vinyl banner designed for an upcoming event. This is a straightforward job for an experienced designer, estimated at 20–30 minutes. The ideal candidate will have experience in banner ad design and print design, with proficiency in Adobe Photoshop and graphic design.
